heading: Modification of agreements; compromise, waiver or release
label: 297g Modification of agreements; compromise, waiver or release
text: The Secretary may agree to modifications of agreements made under this part, and may compromise, waive, or release any right, title, claim, or demand of the United States arising or acquired under this part.
notes: Amendments2010— substituted “this part” for “this subpart” in two places.Pub. L. 111–1481975—, (4)(C), substituted “subpart” for “part” in two places and struck out “or loans” after “agreements”.Pub. L. 94–63, § 941(h)(1)
